source_name: ABS Motor Vehicle Census - EV fleet share

fields.scope: ABS Motor Vehicle Census is the annual snapshot of all registered motor vehicles by fuel type as at 31 January. Released around mid-year.
fields.keying_plan: Key the BEV / PHEV / HEV / total counts and the EV share of total fleet. Compare against the annual sales share to show fleet turnover lag.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed Motor Vehicle Census EV counts. Sales-share leads fleet-share by ~10-15 years given vehicle turnover; this means transport emissions decline lags the EV sales transition.
citation: Australian Bureau of Statistics, Motor Vehicle Census, Australia.
